response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP) at re:cinq, but falls well short of the Principal/Director-level IC bar. The role requires 15 years of experience with recognized AI expertise and demonstrated AI products/platforms; this resume shows roughly 11-14 years of general software engineering with only ~1 year of tangential AI tooling work, no cloud/AI platform leadership, no advanced degree, and no evidence of advising strategic customers or shaping cloud/AI product direction at scale.
strengths: Polyglot full-stack range across TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and embedded/mobile
Recent hands-on work with MCP and agentic developer tooling at re:cinq
Strong craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, community teaching
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML platform or product built at scale, as required for recognized AI expertise
Career level is Senior/Staff IC, not Principal/Director — lacks strategic advisory and org-wide influence experience
Limited cloud platform depth (some AWS CDK) and no evidence of shaping future-state cloud product strategy

key_factors.factor: Seniority gap vs. Principal/Director IC bar
